Who I Am

About Me

I'm Ummu Hanie Binti Mohd Nor — a Year 4 IT student at IIUM specialising in Digital Media Design, passionate about building at the intersection of technology and creativity.

My work spans web development, multimedia production, digital design, 2D animation, video editing, and data visualisation. I enjoy learning tools hands-on and translating creative ideas into polished digital outputs.

Previously interned as an Application Developer at Seetru Studio during my diploma years. Now actively seeking an IT, Game Dev, or Web Dev internship for the July 2025 intake.
